rules.always_applicable: Never N/A; create matchers and enumerate standing logic targets for logic classes.
rules.carrier_bound: N/A only after every configured carrier search executes with zero relevant carriers.
rules.negative_evidence: Every N/A names searched carrier types, patterns, files considered, and empty results.
rules.uncertainty: Skipped security-relevant files, unsupported parsing, or unresolved custom frameworks force UNRESOLVED.
rules.downstream_reaudit: Hunter All triage independently re-audits every N/A; Phase 1 does not perform that re-audit.
